ogTitle: Narrogin Valley vs Naturaliste: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Narrogin Valley and Naturaliste.
heading: Narrogin Valley vs Naturaliste — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Narrogin Valley, Western Australia and Naturaliste, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Narrogin Valley has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Naturaliste (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Narrogin Valley or Naturaliste safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Narrogin Valley has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Naturaliste scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Narrogin Valley scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Naturaliste scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Narrogin Valley or Naturaliste?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Narrogin Valley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
